stemHtml: In the troposphere the decrease in pressure per 100 m increase in height is…

options.a: larger in the lower layers than in the higher layers.
options.b: in the order of 27 hPa per 100 m in the friction layer.
options.c: larger in the higher layers than in the lower layers.
options.d: always larger in a high pressure area than in a low pressure area.
